typography.chinese_character: System default for Chinese (PingFang SC, Noto Sans SC)

flashcard.style: bg-white shadow-sm border border-[#E5E2D9] rounded-2xl p-8 flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-[300px]
flashcard.interaction: Tap to reveal, fade-in animation for pinyin/English. Avoid flipping if it causes motion sickness; use smooth reveal.

sentence_drill.input_area: border-b-2 border-[#1C1C1E] bg-transparent text-2xl text-center pb-2

speaking_practice.record_button: w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-[#4A7C59] flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg
speaking_practice.waveform: flex space-x-1 h-12 items-center justify-center text-[#4A7C59]

progress_ring.style: Circular progress with stroke-width 8, track color #E5E2D9, fill color #4A7C59

bottom_tab_bar.style: bg-white border-t border-[#E5E2D9] h-[80px] pb-4 pt-2 flex justify-around items-center

animations.success_feedback: Scale up slightly (1.05) and tint background with #5C8A65/10
animations.page_transition: Fade in, no complex sliding to maintain calm focus

image_urls.description: Minimalist ink wash abstract background for profile or calm section headers
Soothing pastel gradient background with soft hues of pink and green for Lesson categories

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a React Native Expo application. Map the provided Tailwind classes to NativeWind or React Native StyleSheet equivalents.
Implement the UI using a mobile-first 'calm focus' paradigm: hide secondary options, ensure massive touch targets (min 48px), and use abundant whitespace.
For typography, prioritize system native fonts tailored for Chinese readability. The Chinese characters on flashcards must be massive and perfectly legible.
Use color selectively: the app is primarily off-white/grey/black. Use the specific muted tone colors ONLY for pinyin tone visualization to aid memory without causing sensory overload.
Flashcards should use an opacity reveal rather than a 3D flip to maintain the calm, non-gamified ethos.
Ensure the Bottom Tab Navigation is clean with only icons and small text, completely removing shadows for a flat, modern look.
